title: Yuki's Sleepy Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Little Yuki plays peek-a-boo with sleepy animal friends hiding around her bedroom as she gets ready for bed.

pages.text: Yuki is ready for bed! But where are her sleepy friends hiding?

illustration.description: A little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes standing in a cozy bedroom with a flap-style curtain partially hiding something behind it
illustration.alt: Yuki in her bedroom with hidden elements

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! A sleepy bunny hides behind the curtain. 'Time for bed, bunny!'

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes pulling back a curtain to reveal a drowsy white bunny, peek-a-boo composition with surprise element
illustration.alt: Yuki finding a sleepy bunny behind the curtain

pages.text: Where is teddy bear? Peek-a-boo! Under the blanket! 'Sleepy time, teddy!'

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes lifting a blanket flap to discover a yawning brown teddy bear, interactive feel with playful concealment
illustration.alt: Yuki discovering teddy bear under blanket

pages.text: One more friend! Peek-a-boo! Little owl sleeps behind the pillow. All friends found!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes peeking behind a pillow to find a small sleeping owl, behind the curtain style with hiding and revealing elements

pages.text: Now Yuki snuggles with all her sleepy friends. Peek-a-boo games are done. Good night!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes tucked in bed with bunny, teddy bear, and owl, peaceful bedroom scene with soft lighting and partially hidden moon through window
illustration.alt: Yuki sleeping peacefully with all her animal friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: lift the flap inspired, partially hidden objects, peek-a-boo composition, hiding and revealing, interactive feel, surprise element, behind the curtain, playful concealment

questions.question: Where was the bunny hiding?
questions.explanation: The sleepy bunny was hiding behind the curtain when Yuki found it!

questions.question: What animal was under the blanket?
questions.explanation: The yawning teddy bear was hiding under the blanket!

questions.question: Where did Yuki find the owl?
questions.explanation: The little owl was sleeping behind the pillow when Yuki peeked!
